description: Investigate and fix the delegated-worker completion/landing bug cluster seen with sbdpi-swx.8.2. Confirmed symptoms: worker log reached commit + `bw close` + `bw sync`, but runtime still showed `running`; runtime artifacts did not record `finished-at` / `exit-code`; `/bw workers` reported stale ticket status (`open`/`waiting-ticket-close`) even though `bw show` returned closed; pane reporting may also be stale/mismatched. Goal: make completed delegated workers transition cleanly into exit/landing inspection with accurate ticket/pane diagnostics.
title: Fix delegated worker completion detection after finished worker sessions
